feedback_signal: The CC1 repair QA and adversarial packets were manually authored without the schema-required artifact_probe; the adversarial packet also used truncated SHA values and bound a review to a non-current commit.
root_operational_failure: The coordinator dispatched handcrafted child packets without a deterministic pre-dispatch validation of the packet schema, artifact-probe binding, and exact checked-out full SHA.

durable_improvement.action: Before every PM child dispatch, generate the probe receipt, then run the controller packet-schema and probe-binding preflight together with `git rev-parse HEAD`; refuse dispatch unless the packet's full expected_target_sha equals HEAD and all preflight checks pass.
durable_improvement.prevents: A reviewer cannot be sent a packet with a missing required probe, truncated SHA, or stale immutable target.

commands.evidence: The malformed packet has not yet been replaced; dispatch remains blocked until the replacement packet passes this local schema, probe-binding, and immutable-target preflight.

proof.future_behavior: Packet creation uses full `git rev-parse HEAD` output and a packet/probe preflight immediately before every child dispatch.
